meaning: n.轻吹,唠叨vi.轻吹,胡说八道vt.嘟嘟地发出
examples: I've had enough of your tootle.
I brought four Fruity Tootle bars.
Nice talking to you. I must tootle along.
"It's a big week and it's not impossible for us to win all three, " said Tootle.
It leaves teenager Matt Tootle as the only recognised full-back in the squad.
